message:
fix(fnx-python): propagate graph mode when converting between directed and undirected

Both to_undirected() on PyDiGraph and to_directed() on PyGraph were
creating new graphs with the default mode instead of inheriting the
source graph's mode (e.g., MultiGraph vs simple Graph). This caused
converted graphs to lose their edge-multiplicity semantics.

- PyDiGraph::to_undirected(): initialize ug.inner with source's mode
- PyGraph::to_directed(): initialize dg.inner with source's mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
